## Priority 1: Sourcing/Matching Demo Video (V — Owner)

- **Record a <60 second Loom/Arcade walkthrough** of the Careerspan scan + demonstrator account, positioning it as: *"With Careerspan, you're building a synthetic talent pipeline you can scan at any moment."*
- Use the **existing demonstrator account** data (Donna/Donatella split) rather than mocking up new results — present as real candidates, real data, anonymized job
- Script structure:
  1. Brief intro: first-party data angle, reference Eightfold lawsuit as the "moment"
  2. Quick flash of candidate input side (reinforcing first-party nature)
  3. Mention proprietary AI-detection / "bullshit detector"
  4. Show scan results in demonstrator account
- **Get Zo to draft a tight 45-second script**, send to Logan for workshop before recording
- V is the on-camera presenter ("CEO walkthrough" — Logan's recommendation for credibility)

## Priority 2: Internal Mobility Video (V — Owner, Lower Priority)

- Separate version for internal mobility targets (Reliance, Tata, large enterprises)
- Different hook: *"The best hire is who you already have"* + doomsday framing around hiring difficulty
- **Do this second** — sourcing/matching video is more immediately needed

## Priority 3: Outreach Email Body (V — Owner)

- Draft Ray-style email: concise, assumes-knowledge, one paragraph on quantifiable value, then assets list
- Hook: Eightfold lawsuit forcing reflection on third-party vs. first-party data
- Embed the demo video ("Take 45 seconds and watch what our technology can do")
- Two variations keyed to targeting category:
  - **Sourcing/Matching/Hiring** (Eightfold angle)
  - **Internal Mobility** (talent development angle)
- Prep recipient email list for deployment

## Priority 4: Prospect List Blitz (Logan — Owner)

- Update the target spreadsheet: re-categorize all companies as either `internal mobility` or `sourcing/matching/hiring` (not by their self-description, but by Careerspan's targeting)
- Cross-check remaining companies against LinkedIn data export to widen aperture on companies without an existing in
- **Email KBJ today** — she has connections but needs V & Logan to identify who specifically she could intro; don't let this go cold (already ~1 week since last contact)
- Categorizations noted in-call:
  - Reliance → Internal Mobility
  - Workday → Sourcing/Matching/Hiring
  - Tata → Internal Mobility
  - Handshake → Sourcing/Matching/Hiring
  - LinkedIn → Sourcing/Matching/Hiring

  - Dover → deprioritized (CEO contact left)

## Key Strategic Decision

> "The moment we try to explain, it just has to come off as a rope." — V

**Decision:** Replace text-heavy explainer collateral with short video demos. Ray's feedback confirmed the one-pager was too explanatory and too ChatGPT. The video *is* the collateral now — email text stays minimal.
